business.name: Dukes Septic Services
business.tagline: When your system backs up, we show up

hero.headline: When Dover's septic backs up — *we show up*
hero.subheadline: Same day service. Real people answering the phone. No week-long waits.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Septic problems solved
services_section.subheading: From routine pumping to emergency repairs — we handle it all

services.title: Septic Pumping
services.description: Regular tank pumping to keep your system running smooth. We'll remind you when it's time for the next one.

services.title: Emergency Repairs
services.description: System backed up? Alarm going off? We come out fast and fix it right the first time.

services.title: System Inspections
services.description: Full system checkups to catch problems before they become expensive disasters.

services.title: Drain Field Service
services.description: Drain field problems diagnosed and repaired. We'll tell you exactly what needs fixing and why.

about.heading: Dover septic team that answers the phone
about.body: We're the Dover septic crew that shows up when scheduled and explains everything in plain English. No week-long waits when your system backs up.

reviews.name: Wesley P.
reviews.text: Extremely impressed with their prompt attention. Called around and no one could help for a week — Dukes came right out.

reviews.name: Brian B.
reviews.text: Showed up when scheduled, quick service, explained everything clearly. Great suggestions for keeping an eye on things.

reviews.name: Patricia P.
reviews.text: They tried to help over the phone first — for free! When that didn't work, came right out and solved it for a fair price.

cta.heading: Septic problem? We're on our way
cta.body: Don't wait a week for service. Call Dover's septic team that actually picks up the phone and shows up when we say we will.
